name: Oblige Of CHAOS
short_description: 2D art and 3D action. Elemental Reactions. Not too big Open World. Battle , Puzzle and Explore. Life has no save point.
detailed_description:
2D art and 3D action.
Can jump over fences.
Jump to avoid enemies and attacks.
Build scaffolding to higher ground.

Elemental reactions of enemies, items, etc.
Various reactions to enemies, items, etc. by cutting, burning, etc.
Baking, cutting, and juicing apples.
Slime burns, splits, and grows larger.
A wide variety of weapons, skills and spells
Level up by using weapons and spells.
Alchemize items and materials to create new items.
Treasure chest opened by certain elements.

Not too big Open World.
Battle , Puzzle and Explore.
Freedom to go all over the place from the beginning.
Various locations and gimmicks such as poison swamps, deserts, volcanoes, and ice lakes.
Shortcuts and puzzles using height and elemental reactions.
Increased appearance of strong enemies depending on player behavior.
Find the key to open the door and find the book to level up.
Fast Travel Anytime.

The game to experience life and death.
Fear of death, Desire to live.
Impatience to lose the key when damaging at HP0.
Tension to lose equipment when you die.
Hopelessness of losing everything if you die with your bare hands.
Life has no save point.

Streaming guideline
-Individual OK
-Corporation OK
-Spoiler OK
-Monetize OK
